description: Perform a subscription status change by changing contract status.

customerId.description: A unique customer ID for the customer for which subscription status change is done.

customerExternalId.description: A customer ID provided by an external system for the customer for which subscription status change is done.

contractId.description: A unique contract ID for the contract for which subscription status change is done

contractExternalId.description: A contract ID provided by an external system for the contract for which subscription status change is done

communicationIdType.description: Value of Communication type, for example E.164.

reason.description: The reason for the new status version.

status.description: The status for the given time period.

validFor.description: StartDateTime must be earlier than EndDateTime.

startDateTime.description: Start dateTime of the time period. The value is inclusive, including the starting point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.

endDateTime.description: End dateTime of the time period. The value is exclusive, excluding the ending point of the interval. The pattern is based on the definition found at http://www.w3.org/TR/xmlschema-2/#dateTime.
